query: Boden Ski Marathon cross country ski race Boden

videos.title: Skadi Loppet Teaser 2020
videos.channel: Euroloppet Your World of Ski Marathon
videos.description: Skadi Loppet is a Ski Marathon Race of Euroloppet, the most famous Ski Marathon Series in Europe. Skadi Loppet exists since 1990 and celebrates its 30th anniversary in 2020. The race is scheduled on the thrid weekend of March in Bodenmais/ Germany have only been canceled once in 30 years.

videos.title: The Skifix Problem! A problem every cross-country skier knows...
videos.description:
Please tell me, I am not the only person with this problem

Everytime, just before the marathon, I want to take off the skifix from my skis, but my bag is already closed... Where to put them now? 🤷‍♂️ 

Let me know your stories from the skimarathons around the world. 
Btw. this vid was taken at the Tartu Maraton 2023. 
🇪🇪  https://tartumaraton.ee/

Get your own Worldloppet Passport and start skiing around the world: 
👉 https://www.worldloppet.com/passport-benefits/

videos.title: Langlauf Bretterschachten
videos.description:
A tour of the Bretterschachten Loipen on 17 January 2020.   Snow conditions were far from perfect.  The weather changed significantly during lunch (at1:23 in this footage) when the winter sun gave way to clouds and a chilly breeze.

We were accompanied by Guy Beaumont from GB Nordique who had been helping us to improve our techniques throughout the week.  https://www.gbnordique.fr/

Music is 'Tenderness' from www.bensound.com

#NoOrdinaryJob #RedBoots

videos.title: TRAILER: A CROSS COUNTRY SKIER | Taking on the infamous Nordenskiöldsloppet
videos.description: Kristoffer Hjärtström is doing his first Nordenskiöldsloppet, a 220 kilometer long cross country ski race in the north of Sweden. It's the longest ski race in the world and is sure to be a challenge for anyone  on the start line.
